title: Inches to CM Converter
shortDescription: Convert inches to centimeters with exact results using the 1 inch = 2.54 cm conversion.
metaDescription: Convert inches to centimeters using the exact 2.54 factor for dimensions, screens, garments, and technical specs.
intro: Enter an inch value and get the centimeter equivalent using the exact conversion 1 inch = 2.54 cm.
overview:
This converter turns inch measurements into centimeters with the standard fixed factor, so you can work in metric without manual arithmetic. It is suitable for single values, fractional lengths, and measurements that need to be read directly in centimeters.

Use it when a specification, label, drawing, or size chart is given in inches and you need the metric value for comparison or planning. The result reflects the exact mathematical conversion, which makes it useful for dimensions that must be stated consistently across documents or product listings.
howItWorks: Read the centimeter result and keep converting other values as needed.

useCases.title: Furniture dimensions
useCases.description: Convert sofa, shelf, or tabletop measurements from inches into centimeters before comparing space requirements.

useCases.title: TV and monitor sizes
useCases.description: Turn diagonal screen sizes into centimeters when checking fit, stand height, or cabinet clearance.

useCases.title: Clothing and tailoring
useCases.description: Translate garment dimensions, inseam notes, or pattern measurements into metric units for sewing work.

useCases.title: Technical drawings
useCases.description: Convert inch-based design notes into centimeters for plans, specs, and cross-unit documentation.

examples.title: Convert 12 inches
examples.description: A straightforward length conversion for a ruler or component dimension.

examples.title: Convert 5.5 inches
examples.description: Useful when a measurement includes decimals, such as a device width or part size.

examples.title: Convert 27 inches
examples.description: Helpful for larger household or display measurements that need metric notation.

faq.question: What exact formula does this converter use?
faq.answer: It uses 1 inch = 2.54 centimeters, then multiplies the inch value by 2.54.

faq.question: How are decimal inches handled?
faq.answer: Decimal values are converted directly, so 5.5 inches becomes 13.97 centimeters.

faq.question: Why might my expected result look different after rounding?
faq.answer: If a value is rounded to fewer decimal places, the displayed result can differ slightly from a fully exact calculation.

faq.question: Does this tool convert feet and inches together?
faq.answer: No. It converts inches only. If you have feet and inches, convert the feet to inches first, then add the extra inches.

faq.question: What is the most common mistake when using this converter?
faq.answer: Users sometimes enter a rounded inch value from a label and expect the original exact size back. The output is correct for the number entered, but the source measurement may already be rounded.
